title: Sub-screen commit — Schedule must fire POCRTSCHTRAN4 for split deliveries
user_persona: Buyer requiring multiple delivery dates on a PO.
rationale: Even though main commit also writes po_poshd_schedule_dtl, the sub-screen Schedule TRANS is where the per-schedule logic actually persists; firing it ensures alignment with Ramco's real commit flow.

conversation.user: Create a PO for supplier SUP-18, USD, buyer BUY-44, line ITM-PAK 200 units at 9.
Split delivery: 100 units on Monday, 100 units the following Monday. Receive at WH-NORTH.
